title: Blood Sugar Tracker
longDescription: Building a diabetes management Android app using Kotlin/MVI/Room enabling blood sugar logging, and exportable health reports; UI fully designed in Jetpack Compose from Figma prototypes.
techStack: Compose, Kotlin, Datastore Preferences, MVI, Room Database, Koin (DI), Coroutines, Figma

title: Athkar Al Hajj & Al Umrah
longDescription: Developed an offline Islamic athkar companion app for Hajj and Umrah pilgrims using Jetpack Compose and Kotlin, with no network dependency to support user in areas with poor connectivity.

title: Alhezb Alaazam
longDescription: Digitized the Alhezb Alaazam islamic text into fully offline Android app using Jetpack Compose and MVI, serving 10K+ users, with zero network dependency.
